name: caos-chancadem
description: ChancaDEM — a real, in-browser crusher-comminution studio. Set eccentric speed, throw, closed-side-setting (CSS) and feed size distribution on a cone / jaw / gyratory crusher and watch the product gradation, throughput and power form. A pure-TypeScript Whiten population-balance + Evertsson capacity + Bond power engine runs live, and two learned ONNX models (a surrogate MLP + a denoising autoencoder operating-anomaly score) run in-browser. A didactic comminution sandbox, not a plant control system. Part of the Faena mining-analytics hub.
